title: griffonia simplicifolia
intro: Griffonia simplicifolia, also known as the African bush willow or XPE, is a plant species native to West Africa. It is prized for its medicinal properties, particularly its high concentration of 5-hydroxytryptophan (5-HTP), a natural amino acid precursor to serotonin, which plays a crucial role in mood regulation and sleep. The medicinal properties of Griffonia simplicifolia include its ability to support mental health, reduce anxiety and depression, and promote relaxation. Traditional herbal preparations include capsules or tablets of the plant's seeds, as well as teas and infusions, which can be used to support mood balance and improve sleep quality.
